meta.title: Thai Student Association in Kuwait
meta.description: The official website of the Thai Student Association in Kuwait

brand.name: Thai Student Association in Kuwait
brand.tagline: The voice of Thai students in the State of Kuwait

home.title: A Home for Thai Students in the State of Kuwait
home.lead: The Thai Student Association in Kuwait is the home and connecting point for Thai students across the State of Kuwait. We support one another like family — in study, culture, and everyday life abroad.
home.aboutTitle: We Care for Each Other Like One Family
home.aboutText: The association was founded to bridge Thai students, the Embassy, and the Thai community in Kuwait. We organise events, offer guidance, and support our members when they need it most — so everyone can graduate and live happily while studying abroad.
home.ctaBandText: Your support helps the association host events and offer scholarships to its members. There is no obligation to donate — if you would like to support us, simply contact the association directly.

footer.about: Thai Student Association in the State of Kuwait — a home and support for Thai students abroad.

students.title: Thai Students in the State of Kuwait
students.intro: There are currently 58 Thai students (29 male · 29 female) enrolled across 4 institutions in the State of Kuwait.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.intro: Events and traditions the association organises each academic year. Browse by year.
activities.noEvents: No activities in the system yet — please add them in Google Sheet (tab: activities)

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: The association council and channels for contact and support.
contact.supportText: There is no obligation to donate. If you would like to support scholarships or activities, please contact the association directly through the channels below.
